name: sembraniteam-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Sembrani Team for architecture design, database design, feature planning, git workflows, changelog management, systematic debugging, and security auditing.

plugins.name: architecture-designer
plugins.description: Guided architecture and infrastructure design workflow — from requirements gathering to code implementation — with interactive Mermaid diagrams, browser preview, and structured documentation.

plugins.name: changelog-manager
plugins.description: Automatically generate and update CHANGELOG and RELEASE_NOTES files from git commit history with bilingual, platform-specific support.

plugins.name: debugging-workflow
plugins.description: Parallel hypothesis debugging — generates multiple root-cause hypotheses and investigates them concurrently via autonomous agents

plugins.name: git-helper
plugins.description: Generate conventional commit messages and branch names from git context and user descriptions.

plugins.name: perfmind
plugins.description: Performance investigation assistant for web, mobile, desktop, and API applications

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Structured security audit for development and production codebases: SAST analysis, CWE mapping, CVE verification via NVD/OSV, and OWASP Top 10 coverage.
